title: The most insane week in AI
summary: AI Search reviews a major week of AI releases including DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo v2.5, GPT 5.5, GPT Images 2, Qwen 3.6, and HY3. The video covers multiple new models, tools, and research papers across multimodal vision, game environments, code generation, and humanoid robotics. The content emphasizes the rapid pace of AI development with numerous significant announcements in a single week.
